next_steps: Check thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, T3)
Obtain erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and C-reactive protein (CRP) (already elevated, interpret in context)
Perform thyroid ultrasound with color Doppler
Consult endocrinology for evaluation of thyroiditis vs. hyperthyroidism
Consider radioactive iodine uptake scan if thyroiditis is suspected
Stop antibiotics if no evidence of bacterial infection is found
Consider repeating IGRA test for tuberculosis
Obtain thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, total T3)
Obtain thyroid ultrasound with color Doppler
Measure serum ferritin to assess for Adult-onset Still's disease
Check ANA and RF to evaluate for autoimmune etiology
Perform thyroid uptake and scan if hyperthyroidism is present to differentiate thyroiditis from Graves' disease
